calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs Motion For Default Judgment Proveup Hearing And Of Nonappearance (Motions)
Off Calendar Jun-23-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Jon A. Wurfl.
Dept. 514. Judge: Michelle Tong. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:09 a.m.

Claudia Gavrilescu, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Joseph Reed, Loan Workout Specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Gavrilescu and Mr. Reed appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Jon A. Wurfl.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts (Open Book and Account Stated) was filed on December 1, 2020, and personally served on defendant Jon A. Wurfl on May 20, 2021.
Default as to defendant Jon A. Wurfl was entered on July 2, 2021.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Jon A. Wurfl, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,344.31.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $594.90.

Total - $27,739.21.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 10:18 a.m.
